name: Deer Musk
description: The alchemist's prized possession. Warm, leathery, intoxicatingly sensual — an animalic anchor no synthesis can replicate.
sourcing: Gathered from naturally shed pods of managed deer in the Altai Mountains. No harm, no hunt — only what the rutting season freely drops.

name: Oud
description: Liquid darkness. Resin-rich heartwood from century-old Aquilaria, transformed by a rare mold into something transcendent — smoky, balsamic, ancient.
sourcing: Wild-harvested in Southeast Asia from naturally infected trees. We partner with local communities who practice selective harvest — taking only what the forest offers.

name: Ambergris
description: Floating gold. Aged for years upon the waves before washing ashore — salty, sweet, with an ethereal marine shimmer. The whales never know we exist.
sourcing: Beach-collected only. Each piece ethically gathered from shorelines after natural oceanic aging. CITES-compliant, whale-safe, ocean-gifted.

name: Delicate Florals
description: The alchemist's garden. Jasmine plucked at dawn, Bulgarian rose otto from copper alembics, night-blooming tuberose — each petal treated as sacrament.
sourcing: Artisan growers in Grasse, Kannauj, and Bulgaria's Rose Valley. Hand-picked at peak bloom for maximum olfactory radiance.
